# programs.yazi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.yazi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ---------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `programs.yazi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable yazi. |
| `programs.yazi.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.yazi.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages to make available to yazi. |
| `programs.yazi.finalPackage` | | |
| `programs.yazi.flavors` | `attribute set of (absolute path or package)` | Pre-made themes. Values should be a package or path containing the required files. Will be linked to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/flavors/<name>.yazi . |
| `programs.yazi.initLua` | `null or absolute path or strings concatenated with “\n”` | The init.lua for Yazi itself. |
| `programs.yazi.keymap` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/keymap.toml . |
| `programs.yazi.package` | `null or package` | The yazi package to use. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins` | `attribute set of (absolute path or package)` | Lua plugins. Values should be a package or path containing an init.lua file. Will be linked to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/plugins/<name>.yazi . |
| `programs.yazi.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/yazi.toml . |
| `programs.yazi.shellWrapperName` | `string` | Name of the shell wrapper to be called. |
| `programs.yazi.theme` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/theme.toml . |
| `programs.yazi.vfs` | | |
